---
title: "Epigenomic Modifications in Modern and Ancient Genomes"
date: 2022-01-20
author:  ["Laura Niiranen", "Dawid Leciej", "Hanna Edlund", "Carolina Bernhardsson", "Magdalena Fraser", "Federico Sánchez Quinto", "Karl-Heinz Herzig", "Mattias Jakobsson", "Jarosław Walkowiak", "Olaf Thalmann"]
publication: "Genes, **13**, _178_ (2022)."
categories: ["epigenomics", "ancient DNA", "genomics"]
url_source: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4425/13/2/178
url_preprint: 
url_pdf: https://brxt.mendeley.com/document/content/45b14c37-52ba-3195-a61e-7fc9427d240e
journ: "Genes"
volumen: 13
issue: 2
page: "178"
year: 2022
pub_number: 5
image: "../cover/05_Genes.png"
---
